title: Complete Web Development Bootcamp
description: Learn full-stack web development from scratch with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React and Node.js.

title: UI/UX Design Masterclass
description: Master the art of designing beautiful and user-friendly interfaces using Figma and Adobe XD.

title: Python for Data Science
description: Dive deep into Python, Pandas, NumPy, and data visualization to become a data science expert.

title: React & Next.js Complete Guide
description: Build modern, fast, and scalable web applications using React and Next.js from the ground up.

title: Digital Marketing & SEO
description: Learn SEO, social media marketing, email campaigns and Google Ads to grow any business online.

title: Machine Learning A-Z
description: Master supervised, unsupervised, and reinforcement learning with real-world projects using Python and TensorFlow.

title: TypeScript Mastery: From Zero to Hero
description: Master TypeScript from the ground up — types, interfaces, generics, and real-world React integration.

title: Generative AI & Prompt Engineering
description: Learn how to effectively use and prompt AI tools like ChatGPT, Claude, and Midjourney for real-world productivity.

title: DevOps & CI/CD with Docker and GitHub Actions
description: Build automated deployment pipelines, containerize apps with Docker, and ship faster with GitHub Actions.

title: iOS App Development with Swift
description: Build stunning iOS apps from scratch using Swift and Xcode, from UI design to App Store deployment.

title: Graphic Design for Beginners
description: Learn the fundamentals of graphic design including typography, color theory, and layout using Adobe Illustrator.

title: Cybersecurity & Ethical Hacking
description: Learn penetration testing, network security, and ethical hacking techniques to protect systems from real-world threats.
